MINI MINUTES: Dept. 611 Judge Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk S. Ravinantapricha. Not Reported.
Appearances: Michael Padway, Esq. for Plaintiff Daniel Cooper. Sujata Reuter, Esq. for and with the Defendant Jennifer Wong.
09:00am The Court and counsel conference privately in chambers for settlement discussion.
09:45am Parties are unable to reach a settlement agreement. Matter is ordered off calendar.
Parties are directed to return to Dept. 206 for Trial assignment.
Court is adjourned.

Appearances: Michael Padway, Esq. for Plaintiff Daniel Cooper. Sujata Reuter, Esq. for the Defendant Jennifer Wong.
10:00am The Court and counsel conference privately in chambers for settlement discussion.
12:35pm Lunch recess. Ms. Reuter will have the insurance adjuster present at 2:00pm for futher settlement conference.
02:10pm All are present, settelement conference resumes.
04:35pm Matter is continued to Wed. 06/18/14 at 9:00am for further settlement discussion.
Defendant Jennifer Wong is ordered to appear at the settlement conference.
Court stands in recess.
